title: GitHub Actions Node runtime warning audit
goal: Audit and, where safe, update Bureau GitHub Actions versions or runner assumptions so Node.js 20 deprecation warnings no longer obscure CI signal quality.

acceptance.assertion: The current GitHub Actions Node runtime warning is reproduced or shown to be resolved from live CI evidence.
If newer action versions are available and compatible, the workflow update is applied with CI proof; otherwise the deferral reason is recorded.
The change does not weaken branch, PR, registry or validation gates.

metadata.source_observation: Bureau PR #359 CI passed but emitted: Node.js 20 is deprecated; actions/checkout@v4 and actions/setup-python@v5 are being forced to run on Node.js 24.
does_not_establish: scheduled sync workflow execution after merge
security correctness beyond the changed workflow runtime references
metadata.outcome: Bureau PR #496 updated all active Node-20-based checkout/setup-python references in validate and Weltgewebe source-sync workflows to native Node 24 action majors. Exact-head local validation and both GitHub matrix jobs passed; complete logs contain neither the prior Node 20 deprecation warning nor the setup-python punycode warning.
validation: Exact implementation head: YAML parse and git diff --check passed.
Exact implementation head: local make validate passed with Ruff, 481 tests, Systemkatalog boundary and registry check.
GitHub run 29245925498: validate (3.10) job 86802701778 passed with 481 tests.
GitHub run 29245925498: validate (3.12) job 86802701765 passed with 481 tests.
Complete logs for both jobs contain no Node 20 deprecation warning and no punycode warning.
Post-merge readback of origin/main at 00fa7f538ae44b035ff9f17fd69d126d4dcdf16f shows checkout@v7 and setup-python@v6 in both targeted workflows.
Post-merge main push run 29246152229 passed on merge commit 00fa7f538ae44b035ff9f17fd69d126d4dcdf16f.

verified_acceptance.bur-2026-005-t018-live-warning: The warning was reproduced from live run 29245174700 and shown absent in both complete logs of run 29245925498.
verified_acceptance.bur-2026-005-t018-safe-action-version-pl: Official current Node 24 action majors were applied; local validation and both GitHub Python matrix jobs passed on exact head 7a945e1a399f4f0ed03b86350c6561e342d663fa.
verified_acceptance.bur-2026-005-t018-no-ci-authority-change: The published diff changes only five uses-version lines. Triggers, permissions, matrices, inputs and validation commands are unchanged.

tradeoffs: Major tags remain moving references under the existing repository policy; immutable action SHA pinning is not established.

verification.verification_note: PR #496 is merged as 00fa7f538ae44b035ff9f17fd69d126d4dcdf16f; exact-head local validation, both PR matrix jobs and the post-merge main push run passed; complete logs prove the targeted Node 20 and punycode warnings are absent.
